leadText: Fusion Flare (Japanese: クロスフレイム Cross Flame) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation V. It is one of the signature moves of Reshiram and White Kyurem.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] This move effect may be in need of research. Reason: Do failed moves actually interfere in the damage calculation? You can discuss this on the talk page. Fusion Flare inflicts damage. The base power of Fusion Flare will double if any Pokémon has successfully used Fusion Bolt previously in the same turn, with no intervening moves in between, except perhaps for failed moves. If this power increase applies, it also causes Fusion Flare to have a different animation than normal. Likewise, Fusion Flare will cause a later Fusion Bolt to have doubled power if it's the next successful move used in the same turn. If the user is frozen , Fusion Flare will thaw it before using the move. If a single Pokémon manages to use both fusion moves consecutively in the same turn (via Instruct ), the second one will still receive the power increase. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Fusion Flare cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 The user brings down a giant flame. This attack does greater damage when influenced by an enormous thunderbolt. X Y OR AS The user brings down a giant flame. This attack is more powerful when influenced by an enormous thunderbolt. S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA The user brings down a giant flame. This move's power is increased when influenced by an enormous lightning bolt. BD SP This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered. S V The user brings down a giant flame. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous lightning bolt.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI It damages enemies. S MD It damages enemy Pokémon throughout a wide area in front.
